pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.4 to 3.1.2 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6 APIs required for modern reactive stacks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin uses this property to set source/target levels; mismatch causes compilation errors or runtime incompatibility on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace spring-boot-starter with spring-boot-starter-webflux to enable reactive web support.
pom.xml.why_exists: The application logic relies on reactive types (Mono/Flux) and WebFlux controllers which are not available in the basic starter.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-starter-data-mongodb-reactive dependency for reactive MongoDB access.
pom.xml.why_exists: Application code uses ReactiveMongoRepository or MongoTemplate which require this dependency to compile and run.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add reactor-test dependency for testing reactive streams.
pom.xml.why_exists: Tests use StepVerifier or other reactor-test utilities which are not present without this dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add testcontainers dependencies for integration testing with MongoDB.
pom.xml.why_exists: Integration tests rely on Testcontainers to spin up MongoDB instances; missing dependencies cause test compilation/runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add frontend-maven-plugin to build the React frontend during the Maven lifecycle.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project now includes a React frontend that must be built and copied to static resources; without this plugin, the frontend assets are missing at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add maven-resources-plugin configuration to copy built frontend assets to target/classes/static.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot serves static content from classpath:static; without this copy step, the frontend UI is not accessible.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jacoco-maven-plugin for code coverage reporting.
Add SonarQube properties for code quality analysis.
Rename project artifactId and name from chatservice/chat-service to chatter.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Added MongoDB connection URI configuration to application.properties.
